text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nyehehe... Hehehahaheheh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, could you hear that? I was just making some fangirl battle
plans for my next day off and got a little carried away.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've really been trying to pour extra love into my simping lately.
Y'know, to make good on the whole "resolve" thing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I have been doing my due diligence. I give praise at my merch shrine every single day and thank my idols for their blessings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, you've won me over. I'll be an all-rounder! I'll run turf and
dirt and admire all my oshis up close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Lady Luck favors those who do good deeds, so I accumulate karma by
supporting my favorite racers. Therefore, fangirling is an essential
part of my training!

I'm still shaky on the details of what "simping" entails, but if it
involves training...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Join me? To go simping? I mean, you're welcome to come if you want.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just, are you sure? I'm talking like hardcore simping. I completely understand that some types of events aren't for everyone, so you don't have to force yourself...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...I respect the resolve, Trainer. So I won't hold back! We're going on
a full tour of my oshis' races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gwaaaajkahdk! It was so worth coming out to Hanshin Racecourseee! What an amazing debut!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The runner who got first place is actually the younger sister of a racer
who just retired last season. Apparently, she debuted to carry on the
mantleeeee!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Neither of them's letting up! The rivals are neck and neck! But the
homestretch of Nakayama Racecourse is famously shoooort! Aaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Sob... What a beautiful race! Their feelings for each other went beyond mere aptitudes... They weren't just neck and neck, but also heart-to-heart! I can't even...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The dirt track at Oi Racecourse is pretty long compared to most
places. The extra distance allows late surgers and end closers room to
shine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even so, she chose to tackle the race as a front runner—true to her
heart. She had such a proud, satisfied grin at the end... It didn't
matter that she got fourth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you feel that?! The passion radiating from all those beautiful Umamusume?! Their smiles just fill my heart with so much joy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Let's channel this energy into merch shopping! Are you ready
to hit the booths?!
choice_data_list: Not as ready as you, it seems...
Not as ready as you, it seems...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Trainer, are you okay? You look completely wiped, so you hang
tight and leave the spoils to me!

I take Digital up on that and rest for a while, but... she doesn't come
back. Worried, I go looking for her.

I can't believe I'm looking at the real Agnes Digital! I'm a huge fan!
Huge!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
I was blown away by your decision to run turf and dirt! What's the
whole story behind that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, well I... I um... I kinda, y'know... yeah.

Ah. Fan interaction. Seeing Digital struggle to form a response, I jump
in to help.
choice_data_list: It all started when we were watching a race...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah... T-Trainerrr!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh. You saved my life back there. I'm still not used to people wanting to talk to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That aside, though, why are you here? You looked kinda lost.
choice_data_list: It'd been a while since you left, so...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So you... You fought back your fatigue... and came all this way? Oh,
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You should've told me you were that excited to go merch shopping!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I totally know the feeling! How could we wait with all
that glorious merchandise waiting for us?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I swear we've got the same brain. For real for real. I'm so glad you're
enjoying the little simp tour I tossed together!

Seeing the way she beams at me... I don't correct the
misunderstanding. I let her pull me from booth to booth, listening to
her happily chat away.
